title: biscutella marinae
intro: Biscutella marinae, also known as sea kidney, is a type of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Biscutella marinae include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, and act as an antimicrobial agent, which can help to prevent infections. Biscutella marinae can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
